violations.text: Litter and other debris was observed in the refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris: -floors and walls in the back food storage area, -floors under retail shelves. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

All restrooms is lacking handwashing signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands is required at all hand washing sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Dumpster area has an accumulation of debris, litter, and/or food debris. Refuse areas should be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean and kept free of unnecessary equipment litter to prevent harborage. conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

The floors under the food retail shelves and back food storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris or dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
